items.title: Bessent torches Democrat's ‘sanctions relief’ claims, calls $14B Iran/Russia charge a DNC talking point
items.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Sen. Chris Coons clash over claims that Iran gained $14 billion from temporary U.S. sanctions relief on oil.

items.title: Trump says he wants 'somebody' to buy Spirit Airlines, opposes United-American merger

items.title: DOJ reportedly pursuing criminal antitrust probe of major meatpacking companies
items.description: The DOJ is reportedly investigating four major beef companies in a criminal antitrust probe after Trump claimed meatpackers manipulated cattle prices.

items.title: How does Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh view the central bank's inflation goal?

items.title: Who is Kevin Warsh, Trump's pick to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed chair?
items.description: President Donald Trump nominated former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh at the end of January to become chairman of the central bank.
